rules: Never center headings by default. Use explicit alignment.
Do NOT use Inter, Roboto, Open Sans, Lato, or Syne for headings.
Use JetBrains Mono for data metrics (92%, 70K+) to emphasize the AI/Data context.
True black background (#000000) for maximum OLED contrast.
Use Electric Orange (#FF4500) strictly for interactive accents and key data highlights.

grid.mode: The 'Tetris' Grid (Bento style for Skills and Projects)

surfaces.cards: bg-[#121212] border border-white/10 p-8 hover:border-white/20 transition-colors

animations.hover: Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1) with border color change.
animations.hero: Kinetic typography or smooth reveal for the H1.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF4500] text-white px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-[#E03E00] transition-colors rounded-none
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors rounded-none

components.tags: px-3 py-1 bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-xs font-mono text-zinc-300 rounded-full
components.navigation: Sticky top glassmorphism header, z-50. Visible links on desktop.
components.form: Shadcn UI Input/Textarea heavily customized: bg-transparent border-white/10 focus:border-[#FF4500] rounded-none.

sections.name: Hero
sections.content: Jahnavi Somu - AI Business Analyst / AI Data Analyst. Pursuing M.S. in Data Science. Located Jersey City, NJ.
sections.design_instructions: Massive typography. Overlay the abstract network background image with bg-black/80 so text is perfectly legible. Include two CTAs: Download Resume, Contact Me.

sections.name: About
sections.content: 1.5+ years experience in healthcare & enterprise. Bridging data and business logic.
sections.design_instructions: Asymmetric layout. Text on one side, profile picture (or abstract data visual if preferred) on the other. Use JetBrains Mono for specific tech keywords.

sections.name: Experience Timeline
sections.design_instructions: Vertical timeline with 1px left border (white/10). Highlight dates in mono font. Emphasize roles and impact.

sections.name: Skills Bento Grid
sections.content: Business Analysis, AI & GenAI, Data & BI, Analytics, Data Management, SQL, Power BI, Tableau, Python.
sections.design_instructions: Use a Tetris-style Bento grid. Instead of basic lists, create visually distinct cards for each category. Use Phosphor Icons or Lucide.

sections.name: Featured Projects
sections.design_instructions: Large metric numbers in #FF4500 (Orange) and mono font. Make the data the hero of the card. Flat design, no heavy drop shadows.

sections.name: Contact
sections.content: Working contact form, social links (LinkedIn, email, phone).
sections.design_instructions: Minimalist form. Solid black background with subtle white/10 borders. Large 'Let's Talk' typography.

descriptions.hero_background: Abstract orange network lines on dark background. Use with heavy black overlay (bg-black/80).
descriptions.profile_placeholder: Professional modern headshot placeholder for Jahnavi.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='contact-submit-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use Framer Motion, Lenis, and Phosphor Icons/Lucide.
Do NOT use HTML native date/select/dialog. Use Shadcn components and customize their borders to be white/10.
Do NOT use generic purple/teal colors.
Implement the UI using plain Tailwind CSS in the raw HTML elements for structural layouts, and use Shadcn only for interactive logic.
Ensure all text meets at least 4.5:1 contrast ratio against the #000000/#121212 backgrounds.
Do not use transparent header without blur/scrim over images.
Include data-testid on every clickable element.
